entry.title: IDC 91003123D0003 (P00040) awarded to EDFINANCIAL SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE THE CLASS DEVIATIONS FROM THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) REGARDING EXECUTIVE ORDERS 14208, 14148, 14173, AND 14168.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 91003123D0003 (P00041) awarded to EDFINANCIAL SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE WAGE DETERMINATION REPOSITORY 2025 AND REMOVE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) CLAUSE 52.222-55 MINIMUM WAGES FOR CONTRACTOR WORKERS UNDER EXECUTIVE ORDER 14026.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
